case_title: HARLEEN MANGAT et al VS. SAUNDRA J MOODY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MANGAT, HARLEEN MANGAT, ZORA AS TO DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAY-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J

******CORRECTED ORDER******SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-21-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRESENT ON THE DATE OF THE TRIAL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUPPORTING HER ABSENCE AT TRIAL.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-20-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J
(SC-105) ANSWER FILED W/PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J AS TO PLAINTIFF MANGAT, HARLEEN MANGAT, ZORA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANGAT, HARLEEN MANGAT, ZORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00, PLAINTIFFS ARE AWARDED $200 IN THE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF HARLEEN MANGAT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANGAT, HARLEEN
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-25-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-26-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANGAT, HARLEEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
(SC-105) "REQUEST" FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANGAT, HARLEEN MANGAT, ZORA

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER (SC-105A) COURT ORDER FROM AUG-20-2012 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. **(PER COURT ORDER (JUL-23-2012), 4 COURT HEARINGS HAVE BEEN CONSOLIDATED (CSM-12-839931, CSM-2-839933, CSM-12-839934, CSM-12-839936) SO THAT ALL TRIAL HEARING CAN BE HEARD ON AUGUST 17, 2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT.506. THIS CASE CSM-12-839934 HAS THEREFORE BEEN ADVANCED.)**
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "GRANTED". A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED ON AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.
